body:
Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University, Georgia

Atlas Mentor specializes in guiding students through their MBBS study abroad journey, particularly at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University, Georgia ensuring personalized and comprehensive support throughout the application and enrollment process.

# Georgia

Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University, Georgia

Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University, located in Batumi, Georgia, is named after the Georgian poet Shota Rustaveli. Originally planned as a Boys’ Gymnasium, the institution later evolved to include a women’s gymnasium and eventually became a college. It is well-regarded globally for its medical programs and is recognized by WHO, NMC, and other organizations. The university offers hostel and mess facilities, ensuring a conducive environment for study. With a student-to-teacher ratio of 8-10:1, students receive personalized attention. Degrees from the university are recognized worldwide, facilitating career opportunities globally and in India.

Affiliation and Recognition of Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University, Georgia

Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University in Georgia holds official recognition from key medical bodies, ensuring its credibility and quality education standards globally.

  1. National Medical Commission (NMC): Recognized by India’s NMC, ensuring graduates are eligible for licensing examinations in India.

  2. World Health Organization (WHO): Listed in WHO’s directory of medical schools, indicating compliance with global educational standards.

  3. World Federation for Medical Education (WFME): Affiliated with WFME, reflecting adherence to international benchmarks in medical education.

  4. Educational Commission for Foreign Medical Graduates (ECFMG): Recognized by ECFMG, facilitating graduates’ eligibility for certification in the United States.

  5. Foundation for Advancement of International Medical Education and Research (FAIMER): Listed in FAIMER’s International Medical Education Directory (IMED), verifying the university’s recognition status.

  6. Medical Counselling Committee (MCC): Affiliated with India’s MCC, ensuring inclusion in the list of recognized medical institutions for counseling Indian students.

Faculties at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University, Georgia

Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University in Georgia houses 8 faculties offering diverse fields of study and specialization.

  1. Faculty of Humanities: Offers programs in literature, languages, and cultural studies, fostering a deep understanding of human expression and heritage.

  2. Faculty of Education: Focuses on preparing future educators with comprehensive training in teaching methodologies and educational theory.

  3. Faculty of Business and Economics: Provides knowledge and skills in business management, economics, and finance, preparing students for careers in the corporate world.

  4. Faculty of Law: Offers rigorous legal education, equipping students with critical thinking and legal reasoning skills essential for practicing law.

  5. Faculty of Social and Political Science: Explores complex social issues and political systems, fostering analysis and understanding of societal dynamics.

  6. Faculty of Natural Science and Healthcare: Focuses on scientific inquiry and healthcare studies, training future scientists and healthcare professionals.

  7. Faculty of Technology: Offers programs in engineering and technology, providing practical skills and knowledge in innovative fields.

  8. Faculty of Math and Science: Focuses on mathematical and scientific disciplines, emphasizing analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities.

Eligibility Criteria of Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University, Georgia

There are compelling reasons why international students should consider studying MBBS at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University:

  • No Language Tests: No need for IELTS or TOEFL.
  • English Medium: MBBS education is conducted entirely in English.
  • Affordable Fees: The cost of the MBBS course is accessible to medical aspirants worldwide.
  • Global Recognition: The medical degree from Batumi University is recognized internationally.
  • International Relations: Strong partnerships with leading global educational institutions.
  • Experienced Faculty: Renowned faculty members bring years of teaching experience.
  • USMLE Recognition: Eligibility for USMLE allows graduates to practice medicine in the USA.
  • Personalized Learning: Small class sizes (8-10 students per teacher) ensure individual attention.
  • Quality Education: Offers programs from undergraduate to doctoral levels with a focus on excellence.
  • Top-notch Facilities: Modern educational facilities enhance the learning experience.
  • Safe Environment: Batumi provides a secure and supportive atmosphere conducive to study.
  • Transparent Costs: No hidden fees or donations, making education cost-effective.
  • Peaceful Atmosphere: A tranquil setting ideal for focused academic pursuits.
  • Supportive Faculty: Cooperative professors dedicated to student success.
  • Convenient Accommodation: Easily accessible housing and dining options on campus and in the city.

Choosing BSU for medical education promises a world-class learning environment with global accreditation and supportive amenities.

Advantages of MBBS in Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University

Studying MBBS at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University in Georgia offers several advantages:

  • Affordable Education: Low-cost MBBS programs make it accessible for Indian students.
  • English Medium: All MBBS programs are conducted in English, facilitating easier learning.
  • High-Quality Education: The university provides excellent educational standards.
  • Global Recognition: Degrees are recognized worldwide, enhancing career prospects.
  • Listed in World Directory: Included in the World Directory of Medical Colleges, ensuring compliance with global standards.
  • No Language Tests or Donations: No IELTS, TOEFL, or donation requirements for admission.
  • Optimal Teacher-Student Ratio: Small class sizes ensure personalized attention and effective learning.

Documents Required For Admission at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University

The admission process at BSU is straightforward. Here’s the list of required documents:

  • Secondary School Certificate (Class 10)
  • Senior Secondary School Certificate (Class 12)
  • Migration and Provisional Certificate issued by the board
  • Application confirmation page
  • Medical Fitness Certificate
  • Passport and Visa documents

These documents ensure a hassle-free admission process at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University.

Eligibility Criteria For Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University

The eligibility criteria for admission to Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University are straightforward:

  • Completion of Senior Secondary Examination (Class 12) with a minimum of 50% aggregate in Maths, Chemistry, Physics, and Biology.
  • Valid NEET score as required by the National Medical Commission (NMC) for admission to a foreign university.
  • Functional knowledge of English (no specific proficiency level required).
  • Minimum age of 18 years at the time of admission.
  • Other necessary eligibility certificates issued by the Board of Education.

Duration of Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University

The MBBS program at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University, provided by the Faculty of Natural Science and Health Care, spans a total of 6 years. This duration comprises 5 years of classroom learning and one year dedicated to medical internship.

Medium of Teaching in Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University

The medium of instruction for the MBBS course at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University is English. Additionally, professors also teach the Georgian language to facilitate communication with local patients during the internship period.

Facilities at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University

Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University provides students with essential amenities:

  • Gymnasium facilities on the first floor.
  • Advanced educational equipment throughout the campus.
  • Internet connectivity available campus-wide.
  • Campus canteen offering fresh and nutritious meals.
  • Hostel accommodation with basic amenities for students.

Hostel in Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University

Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University prioritizes student comfort and welfare through its well-maintained hostel facilities. Here’s what students can expect:

  • Clean and Sanitary Rooms: The hostel provides spotlessly clean accommodations ensuring a hygienic living environment.
  • Internet Access: High-speed internet facilities are available to students, supporting their academic and personal needs.
  • Central Heating: Hostel rooms are equipped with central heating systems, ensuring comfort during colder months.
  • 24/7 Utilities: Students enjoy uninterrupted access to water supply and electricity round the clock, facilitating a conducive living environment for focused study.

Student life in Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University

Student life at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University is vibrant and supportive, offering a nurturing environment for academic and personal growth. Here’s what the university provides:

  • Comfortable Living: Well-equipped hostels ensure students’ basic needs are met with amenities like hot water, ventilation, air conditioning, telephone, and laundry services.

  • Hygienic Dining: The college canteen serves safe and hygienic food options.

  • Resourceful Campus: A large library provides access to academic books and reading materials, supporting students’ learning needs.

  • Fitness and Recreation: Facilities include a spa, swimming pool, and sports complex, promoting a balanced lifestyle.

  • Security: Strong security measures with 24/7 guards ensure a safe campus environment.

  • Extracurricular Activities: Various clubs and sports teams such as Women’s Folk Music, Theatre, Basketball, and Volleyball are available, fostering social interaction and skill development.

  • Inclusive Participation: Students are encouraged to join clubs and teams without additional fees, enhancing their professional and personal skills through diverse activities.

Overall, Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University offers a dynamic student life experience where academics, social engagement, and personal development thrive together.
